text:
- [escalation] Andy: Newsletter from Andrew Lang about making care visible and its permanence.
- [escalation] Sir Richard: Rich Lang forwarded a message from Alison Kling about Erin's new show.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports website bugs including broken Van Gogh button, navigation issues in past presentations, and wordy homepage content.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch forwarded an article by Kenneth Gergen suggesting it for Michael Lang's teaching efforts.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch sent a minor text correction changing 'human' to 'our' in a line.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch approves the 'what' page format and requests navigation additions to the vg page.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch requests moving the VG page inside the performances page with a button, and changing the CG logo color to yellow.
- [reply needed] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch reports that two popup circles on the first page display outside the viewport and need fixing.
- [decision required] Google AI Studio: Google AI Studio requires action to secure Gemini API access by June 19, 2026.
- [decision required] Greg Gorsuch: Greg Gorsuch proposes changing popups to hyperlinked pages if they cannot be edited.
